penalties.description: This appears to be an instructional video demonstrating Mishra's knot technique rather than an FLS task performance. No FLS trainer, Penrose drain, or suture targets are visible.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Both models identified this as not being a valid FLS task5 performance. Claude correctly identified it as an instructional demonstration of Mishra's knot technique without FLS equipment. GPT-4o cited poor lighting but both agreed no valid task was performed. The incomplete_task penalty results in automatic zero score.
